page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c9i.6xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor built on the x86_64 architecture, operating at a clock speed of 3.2 GHz. The instance is configured with 24 dedicated physical cores and 24 vCPUs, utilizing a single thread per core design. This dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing performance without resource contention from hyper-threading.

The instance is equipped with 48.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per vCPU. It does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through external block storage volumes. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 15 Gbps. There are no graphics processing units bundled with this instance type.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.c9i.6xlarge offers a high density of dedicated compute resources relative to its memory footprint. This makes it a viable option for workloads that require predictable CPU performance but do not demand large memory capacities. Suitable workloads include compute-intensive tasks, web serving, batch processing, and application servers that rely on external databases or network-attached storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c9i.6xlarge is a compute-optimized instance designed for workloads requiring dedicated processing power. Powered by the KVM hypervisor, it features an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor running at 3.2 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The instance provides 24 dedicated physical cores and 24 vCPUs with a single thread per core configuration, eliminating hyper-threading overhead. It is equipped with 48.0 GB of RAM, yielding a 2.0 GB per vCPU ratio, and offers a baseline network bandwidth of 15 Gbps. No local storage or GPUs are included, requiring external block storage. This resource profile makes the instance highly suitable for compute-heavy applications, batch processing, and web serving workloads that benefit from predictable, dedicated CPU performance without the overhead of shared resources.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c9i.6xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 24 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs at 3.2 GHz, 48 GB RAM, and 15 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for high-compute workloads.

tagline: A compute-optimized virtual machine featuring dedicated physical cores and high network throughput for processing-heavy workloads and batch applications.
